IN LIGHT OF MR. NOAH'S REPRESENTATION THAT THE MATTER IS RESOLVED, AND A PRIOR STIPULATION LODGED WITH THE COURT TO CONTINUE THE MATTER TO OCTOBER 3, 2013, THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO OCTOBER 3, 2013. MR. NOAH TO GIVE NOTICE TO PROVIDE THE MOVING PARTY WITH THE OPPORTUNITY TO TAKE THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: KYLE MCLEAN, CSR #13787 OF AIKEN WELCH

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2013 Continued To Oct-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT UNION PACIFIC RAILROAD COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Oren Noah of Brayton Purcell (415.898.1555) appearing for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

In light of Mr. Noah's representation that the matter is resolved, and a prior stipulation lodged with the Court to continue the matter to October 3, 2013, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to October 3, 2013. Mr. Noah to give notice to provide the moving party with the opportunity to take the matter off calendar. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Clerk: E.
